text: Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. A few showers later. Force 2 to 3 southwesterly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. A few thundery showers later. Force 2 to 4 west to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. A few showers later. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 2 to 4 north to northwesterly winds with gusts.
